# MethodDescriptor.RequiresParams property

When `true`, the `params` object MUST be present on every request to this method. This covers the case where a method's per-request `_meta` is REQUIRED — `params` must be provided to carry it. A request that omits `params` for such a method is rejected with an invalid-params error response. (R-3.3-i)

```csharp
public bool RequiresParams { get; set; }
```
